message:
chore(beads): re-close ibuuh.29, 9tlrh, ibuuh.18 after JSONL sync drift

Concurrent JSONL sync drift re-opened three beads whose work was already
committed in prior cycles. Verified each bead's preserved close_reason
still matches live code state before re-closing:

- ibuuh.29 (authoritative rebuild pipeline): keyset + batched fetches +
  bounded memory still wired through rebuild_tantivy_from_db_with_options
  in src/indexer/mod.rs; the four unit tests and the
  tests/cli_index.rs::index_full_persists_lexical_rebuild_equivalence_ledger
  E2E are intact.
- 9tlrh (extended generation manifests): LexicalGenerationBuildBudget,
  LexicalShardLifecycleState, and the snake_case serialization tests are
  all present in src/indexer/lexical_generation.rs.
- ibuuh.18 (semantic model cache lifecycle): the
  BudgetBlocked/QuarantinedCorrupt classification vocabulary and
  classify_cache_policy_* tests are intact in src/search/model_download.rs.

No source changes; beads-only commit to stop these three from being
re-surfaced as ready work every cycle.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
